usage: Swaps from {status:IronMaidenPersonality} mode to {status:SilverOpportunity} mode after getting enough Unique {keyword:Charge} ({status:ChargeBodyArt}) Potency. The former has more clash power with a clashable guard and the latter has more speed and damage with an evade that gives {status:SupportProtect}. Skills are largely the same otherwise.

Gains {status:ChargeBodyArt} Count when doing damage and killing targets on top of the amount gained from her S2. Her S2 and S3 consumes Count for power, damage, and {status:SuperCoin}s. Her S3-2 can also gain atk weight.
Gains additional power, damage, and {keyword:Bleed} application with {status:ChargeBodyArt} Potency due to gaining {status:FasciaPersonality} at 2+ Potency.

1021501.desc:
Double the amount of Speed, Clash Power, damage buff gained from [MelodyBodyArt]

On Hit, if the Attack Skill inflicted a negative effect, heal 4 SP at Attack End (2 times per turn)
1021501.name: Inspired by Critique

1021503.desc:
Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, gain [IronMaidenPersonality]

Turn End: If this unit has [FasciaPersonality], this unit loses [IronMaidenPersonality] and gains [SilverOpportunity] (once per Encounter)
- When Staggered, recover from Stagger (excluding forced Staggers)
1021503.name: Armor of Protection and Repression

1021504.desc:
Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, gain +(# of The Ring allies on the field x 2) [ChargeBodyArt] Count (max 10)

Skill End: If the Skill dealt HP or Shield damage, gain +5 [ChargeBodyArt] Count
- If target is killed, gain +3 additional [ChargeBodyArt] Count

Gain 1 [ChargeBodyArt] every time this unit consumes 10 cumulative [ChargeBodyArt] Count in this Encounter
- If the above effect brings this unit's [ChargeBodyArt] Potency to 2 or higher, gain [FasciaPersonality]

Base Attack Skills and Clashable Counter Skill count as Skills that gain [Charge] Count
1021504.name: Fascia, My Precious Artwork

1021511.desc:
Double the amount of Speed, Clash Power, damage buff gained from [MelodyBodyArt]

On Hit, if the Attack Skill inflicted a negative effect, heal 4 SP at Attack End (2 times per turn)
- If this unit's SP is at max, gain 1 [SlashDamageUp] next turn when this unit heals SP with this effect (once per turn)
1021511.name: Inspired by Critique

1021521.desc:
When hit, allies that equipped Defense Skill on their Slots this turn inflict 4 [Laceration] on the attacker (2 times per turn)
- If the attacker already has [Laceration], inflict +2 [Laceration] Count instead
1021521.name: Iron Maiden - Spikes
